title: Lexical Resources in NLP Ecosystem
description: A diagram showing the relationship between core NLP lexical resources and their applications, illustrating how they support the processing and understanding of natural language.
elements: NLP Application (e.g., Machine Translation, Sentiment Analysis)
relationships: Raw Text Corpus feeds into Lexical Database and Morphological Analyzer
Lexical Database provides semantic and syntactic information to Part-of-Speech Tagger and Semantic Parser
Morphological Analyzer provides word structure data to Part-of-Speech Tagger
Part-of-Speech Tagger and Named Entity Recognizer provide processed data to Semantic Parser
Semantic Parser enables final NLP Applications
